default.description: Name of the model configuration to use by default. Must match a name in the models array.

models.description: Array of model configurations. Each model has its own tuning parameters.

Brain.description: Brain defines model configurations and the active default.

base_image.description:
Override the default base image (agentcrate/base:latest). Required when
the build section is present.
Docker image reference. Server-side validation should enforce format (registry/image:tag) and max length.

Build.description: Build configures the container image build process.

tool.description: Skill name that requires human approval.

condition.description: Condition expression for when HITL is required (e.g., "always", "cost > 100").

HITLRule.description: HITLRule defines a human-in-the-loop approval requirement.

name.description:
Agent name. Lowercase alphanumeric with dots, hyphens, underscores. Max 128 chars.
NOTE: Commas in jsonschema patterns must be escaped as \, because the struct tag parser treats commas as delimiters.

Metadata.description: Metadata contains agent identity and discoverability information.

name.description: Short identifier for this model configuration (e.g., sonnet, local, fast).

model.description:
Provider-qualified model identifier (e.g., anthropic/claude-3.5-sonnet, openai/gpt-4o, ollama/llama3).
Provider and model names must be lowercase.

max_tokens.description: Maximum tokens per response for this model.

top_p.description: Top-p (nucleus) sampling parameter for this model.

ModelConfig.description: ModelConfig defines a named model with provider-qualified identifier and tuning.

system_prompt.description: The system-level instruction that defines agent behavior.

name.description: Display name for the agent persona.

role.description: Role description (e.g., Code Reviewer, Research Assistant).

Persona.description: Persona defines the agent's identity and behavioral framing.

allowed_domains.description: List of allowed network domains the agent can access.

Policies.description: Policies defines security constraints and governance rules.

brain.description: Profile brain override. Can only switch the active model via default.

default.description: Name of the model configuration to activate for this profile. Must match a name in brain.models.

ProfileBrain.description: ProfileBrain allows profile overrides to switch the active model.

type.description: Skill transport type. 'mcp' for registry tools, 'stdio' for local binaries, 'http' for Streamable HTTP endpoints, 'sse' for SSE endpoints.

source.description: Skill source. For mcp: registry skill name. For stdio: local binary path (if no command). For http/sse: endpoint URL.

config.description:
Skill-specific configuration key-value pairs.
Arbitrary key-value configuration. Server-side validation should enforce maxProperties and depth limits.

command.description: Binary to execute for stdio skills (e.g., "npx"). If empty, source is used as the binary path.

args.description: Arguments passed to command for stdio skills (e.g., ["-y", "@modelcontextprotocol/server-everything"]).

env.description: Required environment variables. The runtime validates these are set at startup.

Skill.description: Skill represents a tool or capability available to the agent.

skill.description: Skill name to assign permissions to.

allow.description: List of allowed operations for this skill.

ToolPermission.description: ToolPermission defines fine-grained permissions for a skill.

version.description: Schema version. Must be "1" for v1 Agentfiles.

skills.description: Tools and capabilities available to the agent.

title: Agentfile v1
description: Declarative specification for packaging AI agents with AgentCrate.
